---
title: "ANN"
output: html_document
---

# import data

```{r}
train <- readRDS("train_dummy.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_dummy.rds")

str(train)
str(test)
```



```{r, cache=TRUE}
library(neuralnet)

ann_model <- neuralnet(
  formula = is_canceled ~ .,
  data = train,

  hidden = c(5, 2),
  stepmax = 1e8,
  lifesign = "full")
plot(ann_model)

saveRDS(ann_model, file = "ann.rds")

```
